metadata.name: Risk Appetite Compliance
metadata.description: Ensures business activities remain within defined risk appetite thresholds

rules.name: Operational loss within limits
rules.description: Operational losses must not exceed quarterly limits
rules.remediation: Review operational loss drivers and implement controls

rules.name: Credit risk exposure within limits
rules.description: Credit risk exposure must remain within defined limits
rules.remediation: Reduce credit risk exposure to within 85% of limit

rules.name: Market risk VaR within limits
rules.description: Value at Risk must remain within defined thresholds
rules.remediation: Reduce market risk positions to bring VaR within limits

rules.name: Liquidity coverage ratio adequate
rules.description: Liquidity coverage ratio must meet regulatory minimums
rules.remediation: Increase high-quality liquid assets to meet LCR requirements

rules.name: Concentration risk within limits
rules.description: Single name concentration must not exceed thresholds
